violations.text: Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Potatoes were placed warm in display case #1 in a deep bowl. Proper cooling reviewed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking proper labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients including sub-ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Single-service forks observed displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
Refrigerator door gasket of 2-door reach-in #1 observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
Food debris observed in the hand-washing sink at the pantry counter. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Ambient temperature of 2-door reach-in #4 was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Foods in this unit observed with temperatures of 44 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Small amount of TCS foods were relocated to properly functioning units. Service call placed and is expected today. No TCS foods are to be stored in this unit until it is maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
Spray bottle used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies was not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils must be stored in a clean, dry location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of 2-door reach-in #2 observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced/properly repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
Food debris observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
Knife observed stored between 2 surfaces of the large kitchen prep unit. Utensils must be stored in a clean, dry location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024

The cutting board of the large kitchen prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2024
Refrigerator door gasket of 2-door reach-in #1 observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2024
